query: LVMH "Sciences & Creation" Chair partner academic institution announced July 2026

{"query":"LVMH "Sciences & Creation" Chair partner academic institution announced July 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1765,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://ouispeakfashion.com/lvmh-ifm-sciences-creation-chair/","title":"LVMH and IFM Launch the “Sciences & Creation” Chair to Study Creativity Through Science – Oui Speak Fashion (OSF)®","content":"3 days ago — LVMH and Institut Français de la Mode have established the “Sciences & Creation” Chair · The initiative will study the mechanisms of creativity ...
On July 13, luxury group LVMH Moët Hennessy Louis Vuitton and Institut Français de la Mode (IFM) announced the launch of a new academic partnership titled the “Sciences & Creation” Chair.
LVMH has previously developed academic partnerships with leading educational and research institutions to support knowledge transfer and innovation in fields that will shape the future of its Maisons.
Its research will be structured around three main areas: “Creation and Cognition,” “Computational Models of Creation,” and “Social Sciences and Anthropology of Creation.”
“Social Sciences and Anthropology of Creation” will focus on the cultural, collective, symbolic and social dimensions of creativity.
Students will have the opportunity to address real-world challenges, while teams from the Maisons will be able to enrich their thinking through IFM’s academic and creative perspective.
Sidney Toledano, President of Institut Français de la Mode, emphasized the importance of incorporating science and artificial intelligence into the study of creativity."},{"url":"https://ouispeakfashion.com/lvmh-names-philippe-farnier-deputy-ceo-of-dior-beauty-and-the-lvmh-beauty-division/","title":"LVMH Names Philippe Farnier Deputy CEO of Dior Beauty and the LVMH Beauty Division – Oui Speak Fashion (OSF)®","content":"On March 9, the French luxury group LVMH Moët Hennessy Louis Vuitton announced the appointment of Philippe Farnier as deputy CEO of Parfums Christian Dior and the LVMH Beauty Division, effective immediately.
Farnier will report directly to Véronique Courtois, chairman and CEO of Parfums Christian Dior and the LVMH Beauty Division, and will play a key role in advancing the division’s strategic initiatives.
He later joined LVMH in 2008 as general manager of Parfums Christian Dior France, and in 2013 was promoted to general manager of travel retail EMEA and global marketing."},{"url":"https://ouispeakfashion.com/","title":"Oui Speak Fashion (OSF)® | Global Fashion Business & Beauty News","content":"U.S. skincare brand Sweet July has announced its launch on Ulta.com, the e-commerce platform of leading beauty retailer Ulta Beauty, effective June 17.
Effective July 1, 2026, she will join the executive leadership team and report directly to Chief Executive Officer Cédric Charbit.
On June 8, French department store group Printemps announced that its Supervisory Board has appointed Rémy Baume as Chief Executive Officer of the Group.
French beauty giant L’Oréal announced a strategic collaboration with OpenAI, the company behind ChatGPT, on June 17 during VivaTech 2026 in Paris.
On May 13, the Council of Fashion Designers of America (CFDA) announced the launch of “Innovation Hub,” a new initiative developed in partnership with OpenAI to support AI adoption across the fashion industry."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"LVMH Sciences & Creation Chair partner academic institution announced July 2026","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.lvmh.com/en/news-lvmh/lvmh-and-institut-francais-de-la-mode-launch-the-sciences-creation-chair-dedicated-to-new-scientific-approaches-to-creativity","title":"LVMH and Institut Français de la Mode launch the “... - LVMH","content":"LVMH and Institut Français de la Mode (IFM) announce the creation of the “Sciences & Creation” Chair, an academic partnership dedicated to the study of the mechanisms of creation and their contemporary transformations. At the crossroads of fashion, luxury, the humanities, cognitive sciences and emerging technologies, this pioneering initiative aims to develop new knowledge of creative processes, enrich IFM’s teaching programs and strengthen the links between research, talent and the Maisons of the LVMH Group. With the ‘Sciences & Creation’ Chair, together with LVMH, we aim to open a space for research and knowledge transfer dedicated to understanding the mechanisms of creativity. By strengthening the links between research, education and industry, the “Sciences & Creation” Chair is guided by a clear ambition: to better understand the mechanisms of creativity in order to better support talent, shed light on the transformations of the sector and prepare the future of fashion and luxury.","score":0.83093774,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/posts/sdemont_this-is-a-really-exciting-news-to-share-activity-7483197897984106496-e72r","title":"Samuel Demont's Post","content":"3d LVMH and Institut Français de la Mode (IFM) announce the launch of the “Sciences & Creation” Chair, a pioneering academic partnership","score":0.8156003,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://ouispeakfashion.com/lvmh-ifm-sciences-creation-chair","title":"LVMH and IFM Launch the “Sciences & Creation” Chair to ...","content":"On July 13, luxury group LVMH Moët Hennessy Louis Vuitton and Institut Français de la Mode (IFM) announced the launch of a new academic","score":0.796562,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://wwd.com/fashion-news/fashion-features/lvmh-ifm-fashion-school-research-chair-science-creativity-1239063072","title":"LVMH Partners With IFM on Research Chair in Science and Creation","content":"### EXCLUSIVE: LVMH Partners With IFM Fashion School on Research Chair. # EXCLUSIVE: LVMH Partners With IFM Fashion School on Research Chair in Science and Creativity. The world's biggest luxury group wants to study how creative minds engage with technology, as AI is poised to revolutionize fashion design. **PARIS** — As artificial intelligence takes on a larger role in shaping fashion, luxury group LVMH Moët Hennessy Louis Vuitton has partnered with France’s leading fashion school to create a research chair devoted to the relationship between all sciences and creation. Sidney Toledano, the veteran LVMH executive who is president of the Institut Français de la Mode, or IFM, said the school already teaches AI to students at all levels, from vocational training to master’s degrees. “I did a visit to a university recently, and I found a lot of AI in the senior projects in the portfolios, and it’s hard to know what to do with that because you don’t feel like you’re getting a reflection of the person that you would be considering for a job,” he said.","score":0.683948,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.yahoo.com/news/science/articles/lvmh-bernard-arnault-funds-math-085157763.html","title":"LVMH’s Bernard Arnault Funds New Math Institute at École Polytechnique","content":"* Sen. Graham's major moments. **MATH WIZ:** Bernard Arnault's family holding company Agache is investing 50 million euros to fund the creation of a new institute for mathematics and fundamental sciences at École Polytechnique, France's top engineering school, from which LVMH Moët Hennessy Louis Vuitton's chairman and chief executive officer graduated in 1969. Set to open at the university's Palaiseau campus south of Paris by 2030, the new building will serve as a French center of excellence and a hub for international research collaboration, and is seen as key to ensuring France and the school's ongoing competitiveness on the international academic and technological stage. Thanks to Bernard Arnault's unprecedented support, this institute will position [École Polytechnique] as a leading international hub for mathematical research, attracting top talent and fostering the discoveries that will shape tomorrow's technologies.\".","score":0.32318833,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.45,"request_id":"2262b32d-6308-4a20-93ef-a24525ef05dd"}
